description: Continue the turn until checks pass. Stop hooks use top-level decision:block to keep working; reason becomes Claude's next instruction. Respects the stop_hook_active block cap.

hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); if [ "$(echo "$input" | jq -r .stop_hook_active)" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; jq -nc "{decision:\"block\",reason:\"Before finishing: (1) tests passing? (2) linter clean? (3) changes committed? Verify, then stop.\"}"'
